templates.name: Cisco Meraki device by HTTP
templates.description: Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"

items.name: Get status
items.description: Item for gathering device status from Meraki API.

items.name: Device status item errors
items.description: Item for gathering errors of the device status item.

triggers.name: Meraki: There are errors in 'Get status' metric

items.name: Device latitude
items.description:
Latitude of the device location
Network: {$NETWORK.ID}

items.name: Device longitude
items.description:
Longitude of the device location
Network: {$NETWORK.ID}

parameters:
switch (value) {
	case 'offline':
		return 0
	case 'online':
		return 1
	case 'dormant':
		return 2
	default:
		return 10
}

items.name: Get device data
items.description: Item for gathering device data from Meraki API.

items.name: Device data item errors
items.description: Item for gathering errors of the device item.

triggers.name: Meraki: There are errors in 'Get device data' metric

items.name: Get inventory data
items.description: Item for gathering device inventory data from Meraki API.

items.name: Device inventory data item errors
items.description: Item for gathering errors of the inventory data item.

triggers.name: Meraki: There are errors in 'Get inventory data' metric

item_prototypes.name: Uplink [{#IP}]: [{#UPLINK}]: Latency
item_prototypes.description:
Latency of the device uplink. 
Network: {#NETWORK.ID}. 
Device serial: {#SERIAL}.

item_prototypes.name: Uplink [{#IP}]: [{#UPLINK}]: Loss, %
item_prototypes.description:
Loss percent of the device uplink. 
Network: {#NETWORK.ID}. 
Device serial: {#SERIAL}.

macros.description: Cisco Meraki dashboard API URL, e.g., api.meraki.com/api/v1
Devices uplink latency threshold, in seconds.
Devices uplink loss threshold, in percent.
This macro is used in loss and latency checks discovery. Can be overridden on the host or linked template level.
This macro is used in loss and latency checks discovery. Can be overridden on the host or linked template level.
This macro is used in loss and latency checks discovery. Can be overridden on the host or linked template level.
This macro is used in loss and latency checks discovery. Can be overridden on the host or linked template level.
The update interval for the script item that retrieves inventory data from API.
Update interval for get status item.

HTTP proxy for API requests. You can specify it using the format [protocol://][username[:password]@]proxy.example.com[:port]. See documentation at https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/8.0/manual/config/items/itemtypes/http
Timespan in seconds for getting device uplinks loss and quality stats. Used in the metric configuration and in the JavaScript API query. Must be between 1 and 86400 seconds.
